subcodes.first_line: O God of the Supreme Concourse and Thou Who art manifest from Thy Most Glorious Horizon! I beseech Thee by the ocean of Thy knowledge and the heaven of Thy recognition and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اله الملا الاعلی و الظاهر من افقک الابهی اسئلک ببحر علمک و سماء عرفانک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation
